statement.latex: Classify the infinite simple periodic linear groups over a field of characteristic$p > 0$. { V.\,P.\,Platonov} They are classified for every$p$mod CFSG (V.\,V.\,Belyaev, in: Investigations in Group Theory, Sverdlovsk, UNC AN SSSR, 1984, 39--50 (Russian); \ A.\,V.\,Borovik, Siberian Math.~J., { 24}, no.\,6 (1983), 843--851; \ B.\,Hartley, G.\,Shute, Quart. J.~Math. Oxford (2), { 35} (1984), 49--71;...
